---
title: "world_population.csv"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/Binath/Documents/KDU/##FIRST SEM/programing with R/world population")
df=read.csv("world_population.csv")
```

```{r}
summary(df)
```
```{r}
head(df,10)
```
```{r}
colSums(is.na(df))
```
```{r}
ggplot(df,aes(x=Migrants..net.,y=Population..2020.))+
  geom_point( colour ="blue")
```
```{r}
ggplot(df,aes(x=Land.Area..Km..,y=Density..P.Km..))+
  geom_col( colour ="red")
```
```{r}
ggplot(df,aes(x=Land.Area..Km..,y=Migrants..net.))+
  geom_col( colour ="green")
```

```{r}
ggplot(df,aes(x=World.Share,y=Population..2020.))+
 geom_point( colour ="orange")
```
```{r}
model = lm(Population..2020. ~ World.Share,data = df)
summary(model)
```
